name: Saffron Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon jaggery or dark brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the rice until the water runs clear.
2. In a separate bowl, soak saffron in 3 tablespoons boiling water for 10 minutes.
3. Heat ghee in a large pot over medium heat. Add cinnamon sticks and cloves; stir until they are coated with butter.
4. Add onions to the pot and fry for 7-8 minutes until golden brown.
5. Stir in the rice and cook, stirring frequently, until most of the liquid is absorbed and the rice is partially cooked (about 5 minutes).
6. Pour in 4 cups water, jaggery or dark brown sugar, salt, and cardamom seeds. Bring to a boil.
7. Gently stir and reduce heat to low. Simmer for 25 minutes until all the liquid is absorbed.
8. Serve hot. Serves 6-8.
